scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir crates/stock-sidecar typecheck && pnpm --dir crates/agent-gui exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --dir crates/agent-gateway/web exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run test:stock-sidecar && pnpm run test:gui && pnpm run test:gateway
scripts.test:gui: pnpm --dir crates/agent-gui test:release && pnpm --dir crates/agent-gui exec node --test test/i18n/translations.test.mjs
